title: rubus × jacquelii
intro: Rubus × jacquelii, also known as the raspberry-lemon hybrid or raspberry-lemonberry, is a complex hybrid of the Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus species, resulting in a unique shrub with edible fruits. This plant contains compounds like anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and salicylic acid, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × jacquelii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. The plant's fruits and leaves can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, jams, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
